en.atmosphere: Tsurumi Line micro-station, Yokohama waterfront. Elevation 4m (flood risk area). Parks nearby (238k sqm), sports facilities strong. Last train 23:43, plan ahead.
en.landmarks: Park system with 16 parks, riverside access. Athletic venues. Sports-first location.
en.food: 11 listings spots, 2 izakaya, 2 bars. Limited selection, working-class joints. No big name chains.
en.nightlife: 5 midnight venues, but no essentials (market/pharmacy/clinic). Early-finish area.

ja.atmosphere: 鶴見線の小駅、横浜川沿い。海抜4m（浸水危険）。近い公園、スポーツ施設充実。23時43分最終。
ja.landmarks: 16の公園、川へのアクセス。スポーツ施設。体力重視。
ja.nightlife: 深夜営業5軒。ただし生活店舗なし。

ru.atmosphere: Мини-станция Цурумиской линии, Йокохама. 4м над морем (паводок). Парки (238к кв.м), спортсооружения. 23:43 последний.
